The Next Evolution

Absolute
Focus.

Cut through the noise. Design interfaces that perform with brutal efficiency and unquestionable style.

Built for Performance

Everything you need to supercharge your development workflow.

AI Code Completion

Intelligent code suggestions that understand your codebase context. Get relevant completions that adapt to your coding style and project patterns.

Learn more

Automated Testing

Generate comprehensive test suites automatically. Kilo Code creates unit tests, integration tests, and e2e tests that actually work.

Learn more

MCP Integration

Connect to 30+ external services through Model Context Protocol. Integrate with databases, APIs, and development tools seamlessly.
